content.seo_title: For Freelancers: SaaS Starter Kit to Solve Deployment Bottlenecks
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with deployment. Use this SaaS starter kit guide to ship production-ready apps faster using Antigravity and Claude Code for freelancers.
content.answer_block: Stop wasting hours on infrastructure configuration. A pre-configured SaaS starter kit standardizes your environment, authentication, and database connectivity. By leveraging Antigravity for architecture scaffolding and Claude Code for automated implementation, you eliminate deployment friction, allowing you to focus entirely on shipping high-value features for your clients.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking on your client delivery, but you're trapped in the 'deployment abyss.' You've written the logic, but the environment variables, CI/CD pipelines, and database migrations are turning your project into a graveyard of unlaunched ideas. The transition from local dev to production shouldn't be a gamble.

True velocity comes from a battle-tested foundation. By adopting a unified SaaS starter kit, you transform deployment from a manual nightmare into a repeatable, automated process. This isn't just about writing code; it's about building a delivery engine that turns your expertise into revenue with every commit.

steps.title: Architecting the Base Structure
steps.description: Establish a modular repository structure that separates business logic from infrastructure, ensuring your project remains scalable.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a robust SaaS backend architecture using Next.js, Supabase, and Stripe integration with a focus on container-ready modularity.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Initialize project structure with modular architecture patterns'

steps.title: Automating Authentication & Auth Flows
steps.description: Implement enterprise-grade authentication so you don't have to build custom user management from scratch for every client.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure secure authentication provider integration with role-based access control and JWT handling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Implement Supabase auth middleware and protected routes'

steps.title: Database Schema & Migration Setup
steps.description: Set up automated migrations to ensure your production environment matches your local development state perfectly every time.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate schema definitions for a standard SaaS data model including user profiles, subscriptions, and usage logs.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Generate Drizzle migrations for defined SaaS schema'

steps.title: Standardizing API & Error Handling
steps.description: Create a unified API response pattern to simplify frontend integration and reduce debugging time during deployment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Standardize API response structures and global error handling for a Next.js serverless environment.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Create centralized API error handler and response wrapper'

steps.title: Deploying the CI/CD Pipeline
steps.description: Connect your repository to a deployment provider with automated testing, ensuring only stable code hits production.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs linting, tests, and deploys to Vercel upon merge to main.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Generate GitHub Actions CI/CD configuration'

pro_tips: Always use environment variable schema validation (like Zod) to fail deployment immediately if secrets are missing.
Implement 'feature flags' via database config so you can toggle experimental features in production without redeploying.
Use a 'staging' database schema that mirrors production exactly to catch migration errors before they hit live users.
Keep your build logs public in a private dashboard to track 'time-to-deploy' and identify bottlenecks in your CI pipeline.
Automate your database seeding with mock data generation to ensure your production environment isn't empty on launch.
content.next_steps: Once your starter kit is deployed, focus on building a 'client-ready' dashboard component library that you can copy-paste into every future project to halve your development time.
content.conversion_block: Stop struggling with infrastructure and start shipping like a pro. With this starter kit, you'll reclaim hours of your work week and impress your clients with unmatched reliability. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
